name: safertranslate
description: Chrome translation extension with bilingual display (immersivetranslate.com style)
author: padawansato

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && vite build && vite build --config vite.config.offscreen.ts
scripts.build:chrome: tsc --noEmit && vite build && vite build --config vite.config.offscreen.ts
scripts.build:safari: vite build --config vite.config.safari.ts && vite build --config vite.config.safari-content.ts && node scripts/prepare-safari.mjs
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:safari
scripts.test:visual:update: docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/work -w /work mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.57.0-noble bash -c 'npm ci && npm run build && xvfb-run npx playwright test tests/e2e/visual.test.ts --update-snapshots'
